title: Privacy Policy
introduction: Digital Haute ("we", "our", or "us") operates the Digital Haute mobile application (the "App"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the App.

subsections.body: When you create an account we collect your name, email address, and business name. Authentication is handled by Firebase Authentication; passwords are never stored on our servers.

Products, vendors, budgets, and other catalog data you enter are stored locally on your device using AsyncStorage and may be synced to our servers when you are signed in. This data is used solely to provide the App's features to you.

If you use the label scanner or product photo features, we access your device camera and photo library with your permission. Photos are processed to extract product information and may be sent to third-party AI services (Google Gemini) for analysis. We do not store your photos on our servers beyond the time needed for processing.
Subscriptions are processed by Apple through the App Store and managed via RevenueCat. We receive subscription status information but do not have access to your payment card details.
We may collect anonymous usage data such as app opens, feature usage, and crash reports to improve the App's performance and reliability.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve the App
• Process your label scans and product data
• Manage your account and subscription
• Sync your data across devices when signed in
• Integrate with third-party services you connect (e.g., Shopify)
• Send transactional notifications related to your account
• Respond to your support requests
• Comply with legal obligations

sections.heading: 3. Third-Party Services
sections.body:
The App uses the following third-party services that may collect or process your data according to their own privacy policies:

• Firebase (Google) — Authentication and backend services
• Google Gemini — AI-powered label scanning
• RevenueCat — Subscription management
• Shopify — Product export (only when you connect your store)
• Apple — App Store and in-app purchases

sections.heading: 4. Data Storage & Security
sections.body: Your product and vendor data is stored locally on your device and, when signed in, on our secured servers. We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted data transmission (HTTPS/TLS), secure authentication tokens, and access controls. However, no method of electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 5. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your account and business data for as long as your account is active. You can export your data at any time from the Data & Privacy screen. When you delete your account, we permanently delete your data from our servers within 30 days. Local data on your device is removed when you delete the App.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.body:
You have the right to:

• Access and export your personal data
• Correct inaccurate information
• Delete your account and associated data
• Opt out of non-essential data collection

You can exercise these rights through the App's Data & Privacy settings or by contacting us at privacy@digitalhaute.com.

sections.heading: 7. Children's Privacy
sections.body: The App is not intended for use by anyone under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we learn that we have collected personal data from a child, we will delete it promptly.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy in the App and updating the effective date. Your continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 9. Contact Us
sections.body:
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, contact us at:

privacy@digitalhaute.com
